products.name: Château Saint-Maur Cru Classé Rosé
products.description: A refined and luxurious Provence rosé. Expressive nose of white peach, apricot, and subtle red fruits with a crisp, mineral finish. Perfect for seafood dinners or elite gatherings.

products.name: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey
products.description: Charcoal mellowed drop by drop through sugar maple charcoal, then matured in handcrafted barrels. Balance of sweet oak, caramel, and vanilla flavors.

products.name: Grey Goose Premium Vodka
products.description: An exceptionally smooth French vodka crafted from soft winter wheat and Gensac-la-Pallue spring water. Light floral aroma with a clean, round finish.

products.name: Heineken Premium Lager
products.description: A standard-bearer of beers since 1873. Balanced notes of barley malt, hops, and water delivering a crisp, refreshing, slightly bitter taste.

products.name: BarPro Mixology Shaker Set
products.description: Professional 5-piece bartender set. Includes a 750ml Boston shaker, double jigger, hawthorne strainer, bar spoon, and recipe booklet. Highly durable stainless steel.

orders.notes: Veuillez livrer le plus tôt possible svp!
